column1: 「仕事の話は一段落しましたが、ところで、最近どうですか？」
column2: 「しごとのはなしはいちだんらくしましたが、ところで、さいきんどうですか？」
column3: 'The work talk is wrapped up, but by the way, how have you been lately?'
column4: ところで (by the way / incidentally — topic change)
column5: ところで + [new topic] (by the way; topic-change marker)
column6: ところで: shifts from work topic to personal
column7: ところで: shifts from work topic to personal
column8: ところで = abrupt topic shift (by the way); さて = deliberate topic transition (well then); それはそうと = that said/by the way; で = so (continuing topic)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:ところで source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:advanced
